holdings.infoBox: MBOX is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 3.34%, ASML Holding at 3.07%, Morgan Stanley at 2.92%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.73%, and Enterprise Products Partners at 2.54%.

overview.description: The Freedom Day Dividend ETF (MBOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks dividend growth by selecting US-listed companies the advisor believes to have the greatest potential to provide rising dividends over time. MBOX was launched on May 5, 2021 and is issued by Freedom Day.
